title: Caregiver - View Personalized Product Recommendations for a Selected PwD (30 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-396: Caregiver selects a PwD from dropdown and views personalized assistive device recommendations. Validates PwD dropdown display, Show Recommendations button state, recommendation results with label, filters/sorting/search on top of recommendations, and edge cases.

testCases.title: Caregiver banner is visible on catalog page
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is logged in and on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Caregiver banner is visible.

testCases.title: PwD dropdown trigger is visible
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: PwD dropdown trigger is visible.

testCases.title: PwD dropdown opens and lists PwDs
steps: Verify at least one PwD option exists.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Dropdown opens and lists at least one PwD.

testCases.title: Each PwD option shows name
steps: Verify each option has non-empty text.
expectedResults: Each PwD option has non-empty name text.

testCases.title: PwD option shows primary disability if available
steps: Verify trigger meta or option text contains disability info.
expectedResults: PwD option shows primary disability info if available.

testCases.title: Show Recommendations button is visible
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Show Recommendations button is visible.

testCases.title: Show Recommendations button state depends on PwD selection
steps: If yes, button should be enabled.
If no, button should be disabled.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Button is enabled if PwD is selected, disabled otherwise.

testCases.title: Show Recommendations button is enabled after selecting a PwD
expectedResults: Show Recommendations button is enabled.

testCases.title: Clicking Show Recommendations displays recommended devices
expectedResults: Clicking Show Recommendations displays device/product content.

testCases.title: Recommendation label shows 'Recommendations for <PwD Name>'
steps: Verify recLabel or body contains 'recommendations for'.
expectedResults: Label shows 'Recommendations for <PwD Name>'.

testCases.title: Recommended device cards display price
expectedResults: Device cards display price in ₹ format.

testCases.title: Recommended device cards have View Details CTA
expectedResults: View Details CTA links are present.

testCases.title: View Details navigates to product detail page
expectedResults: Clicking View Details navigates to /product/ URL.

testCases.title: Switching PwD selection updates recommendations
expectedResults: Switching PwD updates the recommendations.

testCases.title: Disability Type filter works on top of recommendations
expectedResults: Disability Type filter is available and Apply Filters button visible.

testCases.title: Type filter works on top of recommendations
expectedResults: Type filter is available.

testCases.title: Price Range filter works on top of recommendations
expectedResults: Price Range filter is available.

testCases.title: Search bar filters on top of recommendations
expectedResults: Search input is visible.

testCases.title: Sort dropdown works on top of recommendations
expectedResults: Sort dropdown is available.

testCases.title: Pagination works on recommendation results
expectedResults: Pagination nav exists if results span multiple pages.

testCases.title: Device count text updates after recommendations
expectedResults: Device count text matches 'X devices found' pattern.

testCases.title: Reset All clears filters but keeps recommendation context
expectedResults: Reset All clears filters but keeps recommendation context.

testCases.title: No recommendations available shows empty state
steps: Verify page has content (devices or empty state message).
expectedResults: Page shows devices or an empty state message.

testCases.title: PwD with incomplete profile shows recommendations with reduced confidence
steps: Verify page has results or fallback.
expectedResults: Page shows results or fallback content.

testCases.title: Dropdown resets gracefully on page reload
steps: Verify PwD trigger is still visible.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: After page reload, PwD trigger is still visible.

testCases.title: Backend timeout falls back to generic catalog view
expectedResults: Page has content even on backend timeout.

testCases.title: Rapid Show Recommendations clicks do not cause stale data
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on the catalog page.
expectedResults: Rapid clicks don't cause stale data.

testCases.title: Caregiver with one PwD sees at least one option in dropdown
expectedResults: Dropdown has at least one option.

testCases.title: Page renders correctly on mobile viewport
expectedResults: Page renders correctly on mobile.

testCases.title: Unauthenticated user cannot see caregiver PwD dropdown
steps: Verify caregiver banner is NOT visible.
expectedResults: Caregiver PwD dropdown is NOT visible.
